name: keywordSpot
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || typeof output.result.keywordDensity === 'string'

output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || output.result.topKeywords.every(function(k){ return typeof k.keyword === 'string' && Number.isFinite(k.count) && Array.isArray(k.occurrences); })

data.transcript: We will ship the release; the budget is a problem.

_note: LENS_ACTION (registerLensAction). Dispatch key 'voice.keywordSpot'. Deterministic keyword spotting with regex-escaped word-boundary search + context snippets; reads artifact.data. FAIL-CLOSED: a non-finite or negative contextRadius (NaN/Infinity/'1e999') is rejected via Number.isFinite (no silent fallback); a non-string transcript is rejected. contextRadius governs snippet width around each hit. Result card renders totalOccurrences/keywordDensity('N%')/topKeywords[].{keyword,count} EXACTLY — the page's prior inline panel read keywords[].word/.frequency which were never returned (fixed 2026-06-28). Not assassin-driven (LENS_ACTION); authored spec pinned by server/tests/voice-lens-macros.test.js.
